Landing.hero: Compare 3 AI models with one question
Landing.heroSub: Stop guessing which model is best. Ask once, get three answers side by side.
Landing.feature1Body: Send one prompt to GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, and Gemini 2.5 Pro. See their answers stream in parallel.
Landing.feature2Body: Spot strengths, blind spots, and disagreements at a glance.
Landing.feature3Body: Conversations are saved per account so you can revisit and refine.
Landing.footerNote: Built with the AI SDK on Vercel
